button.title: Button
button.description: Every variant, color, size, shape, animate slot, loading, upload, block, active state.

animate.label: Animate snippet
animate.fixedLabel: Fixed width — locked to wider snippet

group.label: Button group
group.title: Button Group
group.description: Fuses adjacent Buttons into one seamless segmented control — the inner radii flatten and `border` seams collapse so the buttons read as a single unit.

child.label: Render delegation (child)
child.caption: Render your own group host element via the `child` snippet — spread the merged `props` onto it and place the buttons inside.

child.label: Render delegation (child)
child.caption: Render your own host element via the `child` snippet — spread the merged `props` and render the styled `body` inside it.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: User thumbnails with text fallback, image, icons, badges, loading, history ring, typing indicator, and grouping with overflow counter.

text.label: Text fallback
text.hint: Strings up to 5 characters render verbatim; longer strings split on whitespace and take the initials.

status.label: Loading status
status.hint: Avatar.Image drives loadingStatus; bind it and listen with onLoadingStatusChange. Avatar.Fallback shows while loading or on error.

child.label: Child render-delegation
child.hint: The child snippet receives the merged root props so you can render your own element, here an anchor.

card.title: Card
card.description: Container surface composed from the compound parts (Card.Root, Card.Media, Card.Header, Card.Body, Card.Footer), plus the color and wide modifiers.

compactSizes.label: Compact sizes
compactSizes.description: Drive the avatar plate with `imgSize` — a number is treated as px, any CSS length works as a string.

player.label: Media player
player.description: Inset image with `imgInset`, a Slider scrub bar in the body, and a centered control row in a non-floating Card.Footer.

comment.label: Comment form
comment.description: A Card.Footer hosting an inline Input.Root and a send button, each sized to fit its content.

colorWide.label: Color and wide
colorWide.description: The `color` prop exposes `--c` so descendant Buttons and Avatars inherit the card's palette; `wide` bumps the max-width from the default 350px to 480px.

alert.title: Alert
alert.description: Two-variant feedback strip built from the compound parts (Alert.Root, Alert.Icon, Alert.Title, Alert.Description, Alert.Action, Alert.Pager). Relief is the default; gradient adds a diagonal hue-shifted overlay. Supports closable, collapsible, and paged content.

pages.label: Paged walkthrough
pages.hint: The kit's Pagination (Pagination.Root in dots mode with arrows) drives the step inside Alert.Action, binding the active page to the shown content.

events.label: Event callbacks
events.hint: onOpenChange fires the moment open flips; onOpenChangeComplete fires after the open/close transition settles.

child.label: Custom element (child)
child.hint: The child snippet hands you the merged root props and the styled body so you can render your own host element.

checkbox.title: Checkbox
checkbox.description: Every state, color, label position, custom checked icon, and multi-select via Checkbox.Group.

group.label: Group (Checkbox.Group)
group.description: Multi-select via <Checkbox.Group bind:value> with a shared <Checkbox.GroupLabel>. Each member contributes its `value` token to the membership array.

events.label: Events & state hooks
events.description: onCheckedChange / onIndeterminateChange callbacks, the published data-state, and a bindable ref to the label element.

radio.title: Radio
radio.description: Every color, state, label position, custom icon, native group selection.

group.label: Orientation, loop & read-only
group.hint: `RadioGroup.Root` owns selection and arrow-key roving. `orientation` sets both the layout and the arrow axis, `loop` wraps navigation past the ends, and `readonly` keeps focus working while locking the value.

child.label: Custom element (child)
child.hint: The `child` snippet on `RadioGroup.Root` delegates the group container — spread the merged `props` onto your own element (here a `<fieldset>` with a `<legend>`).

segmented.title: Segmented
segmented.description: Single-choice radio group rendered as a sliding-thumb segmented control. Compose `Segmented.Root` + `Segmented.Item` (+ `Segmented.ItemIcon` for a leading glyph). Variants, icons, sizes, per-item color, full keyboard support.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: Bind a value on `Segmented.Root`, list `Segmented.Item` children — the thumb slides smoothly to the active segment.

variants.label: Variants
variants.hint: `default` — gray-2 track with an accent thumb. `flat` — accent-tinted track. `border` — outlined track, no fill. `relief` — sunken track with a raised thumb.

icons.label: With icons
icons.hint: Place a `Segmented.ItemIcon` inside each `Segmented.Item` before the label; skip the label for compact icon-only segments (give the group an `ariaLabel`).

iconOnly.label: Icon-only
iconOnly.hint: Skip the label to render compact icon-only segments — provide `ariaLabel` for SR users.

theme.label: Theme switcher
theme.hint: Common drop-in for app-wide theme controls.

sizes.label: Sizes
sizes.hint: Shared scale with Button — `xl` · `large` · `medium` · `small` · `mini`. Outer height matches a Button at the same size.

colors.label: Colors
colors.hint: Group `color` paints the whole group; per-item `color` overrides only that segment — active label and click-ripple bloom follow the pressed item's color.

block.label: Block
block.hint: `block` stretches the group to fill the container with equal segments.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.hint: Disable a single `Segmented.Item` or the whole group at once.

loop.label: Arrow-key loop
loop.hint: `loop` wraps arrow navigation past the first/last segment.

child.label: Render delegation (child)
child.hint: The `child` snippet on `Segmented.Root` and `Segmented.Item` hands you the merged props so you can render your own element.

options.label: API
options.items: Array of `{ value, label?, icon?, disabled? }`.
options.color: Palette name or CSS color — drives the active label, thumb tint, glow and focus ring.
options.block: Stretch to container width with equal-share segments.

switch.title: Switch
switch.description: Pill or square track, three sizes, every color, on/off icons or labels, ghost-knob mode, indeterminate, loading, disabled.

thumb.label: Compound thumb part
thumb.description: Nest a `<Switch.Thumb>` inside `<Switch.Root>` to render content inside the knob. Replaces the deprecated `knob` snippet.

events.label: Events & ref
events.description: Bind `ref` to reach the underlying input and wire `onCheckedChange` to react to toggles; the panel mirrors the published `data-state`.

input.title: Input
input.description: Every label style, every state color, every variant, icon (before / after), password reveal, progress bar, loading, message slot.

message.label: Message slot
message.error: Please enter a valid email address.

child.label: Render delegation (child)
child.hint: The child snippet replaces the inner <input> with your own element while the shell — bg, focus ripple, icon — is preserved. Spread the merged props it hands you.

events.label: Events & ref
events.hint: onValueChange fires on every edit; bind:ref exposes the underlying <input> element for focus / measurement.

tooltip.title: Tooltip
tooltip.description: Compound Tooltip.Root + Tooltip.Trigger / Tooltip.Content. Placement, variants, colors, triggers, interactivity, delay, shape, arrow, loading, manual control, and the child snippet.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: Tooltip.Root wraps a Tooltip.Trigger and a Tooltip.Content.

trigger.label: Triggers
trigger.hint: hover opens on hover / focus; click toggles and dismisses on outside click.

interactive.label: Interactive
interactive.hint: Keeps the bubble open while the pointer is over it, so its content stays clickable.

manual.label: Manual control
manual.hint: trigger="manual" with bind:open; onOpenChange reports each change.

child.label: Child snippet
child.hint: Render your own trigger element; forceMount lets a consumer transition own the bubble enter / exit.

divider.title: Divider
divider.description: Thin separator line. Horizontal or vertical, dashed / dotted, optional inline label, color and thickness.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Page navigation — `Pagination.Root` renders the full styled control by default (the bare `<Pagination>` is a deprecated alias). Numeric / dot modes, infinite wrap, progress bar, ellipsis jumps, disabled / loading items, plus children render-loop and child render-delegation escape hatches.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: `<Pagination.Root bind:value length={20} />` renders arrows, page buttons, and ellipsis jumps with no extra markup.

variants.label: Variants
variants.hint: `default` · `flat` · `border` · `transparent` — the four button looks, set on `Pagination.Root`.

colors.label: Colors
colors.hint: Any palette name or a raw hex / `rgb(...)` flows through to the active button and progress bar.

dots.label: Dot indicators
dots.hint: `mode="dots"` swaps numeric buttons for compact dot indicators.

progress.label: Progress bar
progress.hint: `progress` adds a thin bar below the control tracking position across the full length.

infinite.label: Infinite (wrap-around)
infinite.hint: `infinite` (alias `loop`) wraps the arrows from the last page back to the first.

arrowsOnly.label: Arrows only
arrowsOnly.hint: `arrowsOnly` hides the page buttons and renders just prev / next.

states.label: Disabled and loading items
states.hint: `disabledItems` makes individual pages non-clickable; `loadingItems` shows a spinner; `disabled` turns off the whole control.

renderLoop.label: Render-loop children
renderLoop.hint: The `children` snippet receives `{ pages, range, currentPage }` to render your own summary in place of the default control.

child.label: Child render-delegation
child.hint: The `child` snippet hands you the merged root props (class, data-*, aria-label, color variable) so you render your own `<nav>` element.

select.title: Select
select.description: Single / multiple, filter, option groups, chips with collapse, state colors.

composed.label: Compound API
composed.description: Compose `Select.Root` with `Select.Trigger`, `Select.Content`, `Select.Group`, `Select.GroupHeading` and hand-authored `Select.Item` rows. `items` on the Root still feeds selection state, keyboard navigation and the trigger label.

openAnim.label: Open animation
openAnim.description: Pick the dropdown panel motion. `pop` (default) is a snappy back-out scale; `slide` drops in from above; `fade` is a flat opacity tween; `spring` overshoots with elastic-out; `stagger` pops the panel and flies the rows in one after another.

caret.label: Custom caret icon
caret.description: Place `Select.Icon` inside `Select.Trigger` to replace the default chevron; the trigger still rotates it on open. Omit it for the auto-rendered caret.

custom.label: Custom option slot
custom.description: Hand-author `Select.Item` rows inside `Select.Content` and a `Select.Value` children snippet for the trigger to render rich rows — tinted icons, multi-line content, badges. Behaviour stays default; only presentation changes.

customMulti.label: Custom slots — multi
customMulti.description: Same hand-authored `Select.Item` rows, plus a `Select.Chip` template inside `Select.Value` for the trigger pills.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: Anchored popup with a flexible trigger slot. Click / hover / manual open modes, six placements, click-outside / Esc close.

basic.label: Basic — Button trigger
basic.hint: Compose Menu.Root with Menu.Trigger, Menu.Content and Menu.Item. The trigger's `child` snippet renders your own anchor element.

hover.label: Hover trigger
hover.hint: Open on pointer enter, close after a short grace window when leaving anchor and popup.

custom.label: closeOnSelect = false (manual close)
custom.hint: Items don't auto-dismiss the menu. Useful for theme pickers or multi-step actions.

checkboxRadio.label: Checkbox & radio items
checkboxRadio.hint: Menu.CheckboxItem binds `checked`; Menu.RadioGroup binds a single `value` across its Menu.RadioItem rows. Both publish their state through `data-state` / `aria-checked`.

groups.label: Groups & shortcuts
groups.hint: Menu.Group wraps related rows under a Menu.GroupHeading (wired to `aria-labelledby`). Each Menu.Item's `trailing` snippet holds a shortcut hint.

headerFooter.label: Sticky header & footer
headerFooter.hint: Menu.Content accepts `header` and `footer` snippets that stay pinned around the scrollable rows; both receive a `close` callback.

manual.label: Manual control
manual.hint: `triggerOn="manual"` lets you drive `open` from the outside — the trigger snippet still acts as the visual anchor for positioning.

block.label: Block anchor
block.hint: `block` makes the anchor wrapper stretch to its parent — useful inside a flex / grid cell.

openAnim.label: Open animation
openAnim.description: Pick the popup motion via the `openAnim` prop. `pop` (default) is a snappy back-out scale; `slide` drops in from the anchored edge; `fade` is opacity-only; `spring` overshoots with elastic-out.

timing.label: Custom timing
timing.description: Override `openDuration` (ms) and `openEasing` (any JS easing function from `svelte/easing` — `expoOut`, `backOut`, … — or your own) to retune any variant. Defaults pick a sensible duration/curve per `openAnim`.

dialog.title: Dialog
dialog.description: Modal dialog built on the native <dialog> element. Compound parts — Dialog.Root, Trigger, Content, Title, Description, Body, Footer, Close — with size preset, persistent mode, focus-trap and scroll-lock handled for you.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Imperative `notify(...)` API that mounts toasts via NotificationsHost. Auto-dismisses after 5s by default; sticky pins it, duration tunes the timeout. Six anchor positions, closable, loading, custom icon, click handler.

sticky.label: Sticky (no auto-dismiss)
sticky.caption: Set `sticky: true` to keep the toast until it is closed — pair it with `closable` so the user can still dismiss it.

duration.label: Custom duration
duration.caption: Override the 5s default with `duration` (in ms). Ignored when `sticky` is set.

chip.title: Chip
chip.description: Compact tag, filter, and selection element. Shares Button's variant vocabulary, scale, focus ring, and ripple — chips and buttons read as the same family.

active.label: Active state
active.hint: Click to toggle. Filter / selection chips reuse `active` and announce as `aria-pressed`.

onActiveChange.label: onActiveChange callback
onActiveChange.hint: A clickable chip is controllable via `bind:active` plus `onActiveChange` — the callback fires with the next pressed value.

child.label: child snippet
child.hint: Render-delegation: a clickable chip's body forwards its merged props to your own host element — here an `<a>` link — while keeping the styled chip content.

harmony.label: Alongside Input & Button
harmony.hint: Same surface palette, same focus accent, same radius rhythm — the form, action, and tag layer compose into one input row.

scrollbar.title: Scrollbar
scrollbar.description: Themed, auto-hiding scrollbars applied kit-wide via base styles. Two pieces wire it up: tokens.css sets scrollbar-color on every element from three CSS variables, and <ScrollbarHost> — mounted once at the app root — toggles [data-scrolling] on whatever element is being scrolled so the variables can swap between idle and active.

default.label: Default — wire-up
default.hint: Import ScrollbarHost from the kit and mount it once at your app root. It installs a single capture-phase scroll listener and toggles [data-scrolling] on the element that emitted the event; tokens.css picks up the attribute and swaps the thumb color. The kit-wide host is already in +layout.svelte — the second mount in this example is a no-op (module-level guard) and exists only to make the contract readable.

liveState.label: Live [data-scrolling]
liveState.hint: Same default container with a MutationObserver mirroring the attribute that ScrollbarHost flips. Scroll the box to watch the pill go on, then back off ~1s after the last scroll event — proves the JS/CSS handshake.

alwaysVisible.label: Always visible
alwaysVisible.hint: Override --scrollbar-thumb with a visible color when discoverability matters more than minimalism. The auto-hide swap to --scrollbar-thumb-hover still fires while scrolling.

brand.label: Brand-tinted active state
brand.hint: Override --scrollbar-thumb-hover to tint the active-state thumb with a kit color token. Rest state stays transparent so the surface reads clean when idle.

track.label: Tinted track
track.hint: Override --scrollbar-track to give the trough a subtle background — useful when the surface needs a clear scroll affordance even at rest.

horizontal.label: Horizontal axis
horizontal.hint: scrollbar-color is axis-agnostic — the same three variables retint the horizontal scrollbar too. ScrollbarHost listens to all scroll events, so the active-state swap fires identically.

variables.label: All variables
variables.hint: Override on :root for a global change, on any container for a scoped change.
variables.thumb: Thumb color at rest. Transparent enables auto-hide.
variables.thumbHover: Thumb color while the container is being scrolled (or 1s after).

ripple.title: Ripple
ripple.description: GPU-composited click bloom packaged as a Svelte action. Drop on any host element with use:ripple — installs its own scoped stylesheet on first use, cleans up on destroy.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: use:ripple with no options uses the kit primary color.

colors.label: Colors
colors.hint: Pass color as a kit palette name or any CSS color string — the ripple inherits the accent.

solidBg.label: Solid background
solidBg.hint: Set solidBg: true when the host's background already IS the accent color (filled buttons). Lifts the disc body so the wave reads against the surface.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.hint: disabled: true skips ripple emission entirely without removing the listener.

textColor.label: Text color shift
textColor.hint: Host text animates to textColor during the bloom (default rgb(var(--on-accent)) — matches the kit's text-on-accent token, same as Button's default variant) and back on settle.

surfaces.label: Arbitrary surfaces
surfaces.hint: Ripple respects the host's border-radius — works on cards, circles, anything.

options.label: Options
options.color: Accent color for this ripple. Palette name or CSS color string.
options.solidBg: Lift the disc body so the wave doesn't blend into a host that's already the accent color.
options.textColor: Colour the host text animates to during the bloom. Defaults to rgb(var(--on-accent)) — kit's text-on-accent token. Pass 'currentColor' to disable the shift.

list.title: List
list.description: Surface for vertical item collections — palette-aware, sized, dividers, sections, listbox selection.

label.label: Section labels
label.hint: List.Label renders an inline caption inside the surface.

listbox.label: Listbox (single)
listbox.hint: Arrows / Home / End for keyboard nav.

child.label: Custom element
child.hint: The child snippet delegates a row to your own element via the merged props.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Linear or circular progress with indeterminate, stripes, custom thickness, and palette colors.

inputNumber.title: Input Number
inputNumber.description: Numeric stepper with min/max/step, long-press auto-repeat, focus ripple, and the kit's size / shape / palette contract.

customIcons.label: Custom stepper icons
customIcons.hint: A glyph passed as children of InputNumber.Increment / InputNumber.Decrement replaces the default ± icons; incrementLabel / decrementLabel set their aria-labels.

child.label: Render delegation (child)
child.hint: The child snippet hands you the merged root props — input-number classes, data-* state hooks, style and the bindable ref — so you render your own root element and own its body.

events.label: Events & ref
events.hint: onValueChange fires on every committed change (after clamping); bind:ref exposes the root <div>; InputNumber.Field labelId wires an external label via aria-labelledby.

textarea.title: Textarea
textarea.description: Multi-line input with all the same variants/states/labels as Input. Auto-grow available.

autoGrow.label: Auto-grow
autoGrow.placeholder: I grow with what you type…

mask.label: Mask
mask.hint: A mask pattern restricts input to the given shape. Tokens: # digit, @ letter, * alphanumeric.

events.label: Events & ref
events.hint: onValueChange fires on every edit; bind:ref exposes the wrapper <div> for focus / measurement.

slider.title: Slider
slider.description: Single value or `[start, end]` range. Three sizes, tooltip on hover/focus, optional ticks, value formatter, palette colors.

composed.label: Compound API
composed.hint: Slider.Root + Slider.Track / Range / Thumb / Tooltip. This is exactly what the bare <Slider> renders by default — compose the parts when you need custom markup.

composedRange.label: Compound API — range
composedRange.hint: type="multiple" yields two thumbs and tooltips; add one Slider.Tick per step you want marked.

events.label: Events & ref
events.hint: onValueChange fires with the next value (number, or [start, end] for a range); bind:ref exposes the wrapper <div> for focus / measurement. ariaLabel names the control for assistive tech.

timePicker.title: DateTime Picker
timePicker.description: A single polymorphic field with a dropdown panel. Set type to time, date or datetime and bind:value — the matching panel (wheels, calendar, or both) loads on demand. Manual typing, optional seconds and 12-hour mode, locale-aware calendar, min/max bounds, customizable icon side and glyph.

types.label: Types
types.hint: One component, three modes. Pick a type — the right panel chunk loads on demand. The bound value is HH:MM[:SS] / YYYY-MM-DD / YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM[:SS].

withSeconds.label: With seconds
withSeconds.hint: showSeconds adds a third wheel and a seconds segment to time-bearing types.

hour12.label: 12-hour mode
hour12.hint: hour12 shows AM/PM in the input and a segmented switcher in the panel. The bound value stays 24-hour ISO.

label.label: With label
label.hint: Floating, inline and static labels via the same label / labelStyle props as the kit's Input.

locale.label: Locale & week start
locale.hint: locale drives the calendar's month / weekday names; weekStart overrides the first column (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).

restricted.label: Min / max bounds
restricted.hint: min and max clamp the selectable range on date-bearing types (inclusive). Out-of-range days are disabled in the calendar.

iconPosition.label: Icon position
iconPosition.hint: iconPosition="before" moves the glyph to the leading edge of the field.

customIcon.label: Custom icon
customIcon.hint: Pass an icon snippet to override the default clock (time) / calendar (date · datetime) glyph.

placement.label: Placement & block
placement.hint: placement anchors the panel relative to the trigger; block stretches the field to its container.

events.label: Events & open state
events.hint: onValueChange fires on every committed value change; onOpenChange reports the dropdown state, which is also bindable via bind:open.

colors.label: Colors
colors.hint: color flows through the input, calendar chrome, time wheels and AM/PM segmented.

states.label: States
states.hint: disabled makes both trigger and panel inert; readonly keeps the value visible but blocks edits.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Compound month grid powered by Temporal. Calendar.Root drives single-day or range selection; compose Header / Grid yourself or let the default month view render. Full keyboard navigation, locale-aware labels.

events.label: Events & placeholder
events.hint: onValueChange fires on pick, onValueChangeComplete after the pill settles; placeholder + onPlaceholderChange control and report the view month.

composed.label: Compound parts
composed.hint: Calendar.Root + Calendar.Header (PrevButton / Heading / NextButton) + Calendar.Grid. This is exactly what the bare default renders — compose the parts when you need custom markup.

customDay.label: Custom day snippet
customDay.hint: The day snippet receives the Temporal.PlainDate and its CalendarDayState (today / selected / range flags) so you can render dots, prices or any custom cell content.

readonly.label: Readonly · week start · weekday format
readonly.hint: readonly keeps the calendar navigable but blocks selection; weekStart and weekdayFormat tune the header row.

restricted.label: Min / max + disabled days
restricted.hint: Min Apr 5, max Apr 25, weekends disabled

transparent.label: Transparent variant
transparent.hint: Drops the calendar's background so it inherits the surface it sits on — handy inside Card, Dialog or any custom panel.

dates.title: Date utilities
dates.description: Pure helpers built on Temporal.PlainDate / PlainTime / PlainDateTime — exported from sveltastic-ui and shared by Calendar and the picker family.

parsing.label: Parsing & ISO conversion
parsing.hint: Coerce strings, native Date, and Temporal types into the kit's plain shapes — and back to ISO strings safe to bind to inputs.

formatting.label: Locale formatting
formatting.hint: All formatters delegate to Intl.DateTimeFormat — labels follow the user's locale.

locale.label: Locale helpers
locale.hint: Resolve the host locale, decide week start (Sun vs Mon) and 12h/24h time without hard-coded lists.

types.label: Public types
types.hint: Re-exported from the kit barrel — use them on your own state.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Reactive singleton that owns the kit's light/dark and RTL state. Persists to localStorage and respects the user's prefers-color-scheme on first load.

current.label: Current state
current.hint: Both fields are rune-backed — read them anywhere and the UI re-renders on change.

controls.label: Controls
controls.hint: Try these — the entire docs site reacts to the singleton.

api.label: API
api.themeField: Current theme. Updates trigger reactive UI changes.
api.setTheme: Set theme, mirror to <html data-theme>, persist to localStorage.
api.setRtl: Set direction flag, mirror to <html dir>.
api.hydrate: Read stored theme + prefers-color-scheme on mount. Call once from your root layout.

usage.label: Usage
usage.hint: Mount once, then read or mutate from anywhere.

upload.title: Upload
upload.description: Drag-and-drop / click file picker with preview list, multi-select, accept / size / count validation, and per-file thumbnails.

basic.label: Single file
basic.label2: Drag a file here, or click to browse

imagesOnly.label: Images with preview
imagesOnly.label2: Drop images — preview shows up automatically
imagesOnly.hint: PNG, JPG, WEBP up to 5 MB each

withFiles.label: With files
withFiles.description: Selected items rendered as a list with thumbnails for images, type icons for everything else, formatted size and a remove button.

customItem.label: Custom row
customItem.description: Render your own rows with a consumer #each loop over Upload.Item — any layout you need.

childDropzone.label: Custom trigger (child)
childDropzone.description: Render-delegate the drop zone with the `child` snippet — receive the merged props and spread them onto your own button.

mobile.label: Mobile / narrow
mobile.description: Container query — at < 460px wide, hero shifts below the list.

validation.label: Validation
validation.label2: Drop a non-image, or anything > 100 KB

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: Composition tabs — `Tabs.Root` provider, `Tabs.List` + `Tabs.Trigger` for triggers, `Tabs.Content` for panels. Place them anywhere in the template, not necessarily adjacent. The rail shares its visual contract with `Segmented`: spring-animated thumb, press-scale, ripple-into-thumb.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: Default `underline` variant — animated bottom bar follows the active tab.

variants.label: Variants
variants.hint: `underline` · `default` · `flat` · `border` · `relief` — mirrors `Segmented` for the four filled looks plus the classic underline.

sizes.label: Sizes
sizes.hint: Shared scale with Button and Segmented — `xl` · `large` · `medium` · `small` · `mini`.

block.label: Block
block.hint: `<Tabs.List block>` stretches to fill its container; tabs distribute evenly.

vertical.label: Vertical orientation
vertical.hint: `orientation="vertical"` stacks the triggers and switches arrow navigation to Up/Down.

manualLoop.label: Manual activation + loop
manualLoop.hint: `activationMode="manual"` moves focus with arrows but selects only on Enter/Space; `loop` wraps past the first/last tab.

child.label: Render delegation (child)
child.hint: The `child` snippet on every part hands you the merged props so you can render your own element; `Tabs.Content`'s `child` also receives an `active` flag.

composition.label: Decoupled layout
composition.hint: Triggers in the header, panels in the main area — separated by other markup.

keyboard.label: Keyboard nav
keyboard.hint: Arrow Left/Right (or Up/Down), Home/End move focus and activate.

cardPanels.label: Card panels
cardPanels.hint: `panelVariant="card"` wraps panel content in a kit Card-style surface.

composed.label: Reusing kit
composed.hint: Panels can host any kit component — `<Card>`, `<Avatar>`, `<Chip>`, `<List>`.

collapse.title: Collapse
collapse.description: Single accordion item with seven variants, sizes, icon + extra slots, and a Collapse.Group wrapper for single / multiple expansion.

basic.label: Basic
basic.body: Click the header to expand or collapse this panel. Bind `open` to control it from outside.

composed.label: Composed with kit components
composed.profileBody: Senior product designer based in Lisbon. Eight years in fintech UX, currently leading the design system rewrite.
composed.actionBody: Two pull requests are waiting on your review. The CI run finished 14 minutes ago without regressions.

group.cardLabel: Group — card (shared surface with title + footer)
group.cardFooter: Need more help? Reach out to the support team.
group.a1: Refunds are processed within 14 days of the request. Items must be unused and in their original packaging — keep the receipt or order id handy.
group.q2: How do I update my profile?
group.a2: Open Settings → Account. Email and avatar are editable inline; password rotation requires reauthentication.
group.q3: Where can I see my invoices?
group.a3: Billing → Invoices. PDFs are generated within an hour of payment and stay available for seven years.
